Entry.JapaneseText: <Mel>
Entry.EnglishText: <Mel>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Rondoline>
Entry.EnglishText: <Rondoline>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Arche>
Entry.EnglishText: <Arche>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Mint>
Entry.EnglishText: <Mint>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Suzu>
Entry.EnglishText: <Suzu>

Entry.JapaneseText: アルベルト
Entry.EnglishText: Albert

Entry.JapaneseText: ふー、温まりましたねぇ
Entry.EnglishText: Phew, it really warms you up, doesn't it?

Entry.JapaneseText: ほんとほんと。何度入っても温泉って気持ちいいね∀
Entry.EnglishText: Truly. No matter how often I go here, it feels good as always.

Entry.JapaneseText: 相変わらず、<Mint>の胸が大きいけどね
Entry.EnglishText: And <Mint>'s boobs looks big as always.

Entry.JapaneseText: そ、それ、関係ないじゃないですか！
Entry.EnglishText: Th-That has nothing to do with this!

Entry.JapaneseText: でも、ビックリしたよ～ <Suzu>ちゃん堂々と男湯に入って行くんだもん
Entry.EnglishText: On another topic, <Suzu> you really surprised me earlier when you just walked into the men's bath.

Entry.JapaneseText: 昔からお酒を持っていくのを手伝わされていたので 特別意識したことはありません
Entry.EnglishText: A force of habit. I used to help bring alcohol to the mens' bath. I had no ulterior motive involved.

Entry.JapaneseText: 男子たちも<Suzu>ちゃんぐらいの年の子なら、 見られても平気なんじゃない？
Entry.EnglishText: Won't men usually be fine if someone of <Suzu>'s age were to see them?

Entry.JapaneseText: 私も教会でお手伝いをしている時は、 小さい男の子たちと一緒に入りますよ
Entry.EnglishText: I too have taken a bath with young boys back when I was helping out at the church.

Entry.JapaneseText: へぇー、<Mint>さんってすごいですね。 お風呂の時までみんなのお世話してるなんて
Entry.EnglishText: Whoa, Ms. <Mint>, you're amazing for watching over everyone even while bathing.

Entry.JapaneseText: あぁ！
Entry.EnglishText: Ahh!

Entry.JapaneseText: なによ、急に大きな声出さないでよ
Entry.EnglishText: What is it! Don't you just randomly shout like that!

Entry.JapaneseText: いや、思い出しただ！ 思い出しただよ。おら、実は３歳だど。 つーことは、全然、女湯に入れるっちゅーことだーよ
Entry.EnglishText: Nothing, I just remembered something! I'm actually three years old. Which means, I can go in the ladies' bath~!

Entry.JapaneseText: あははは、あんたのどこをどう取っても、 年齢なんか関係ないから
Entry.EnglishText: Ahahah! In your case, age isn't a good argument for you at all!

Entry.JapaneseText: おらは実年齢も若いだが、心はもっと若いだ！ 常に少年の心を持ってるだよ！ だから女湯に入れるだ！
Entry.EnglishText: I may be young, but my heart is younger! I have a heart of a boy! Which is why must let me bathe with you!

Entry.JapaneseText: だから、お風呂に入るだ。みんなでもう一度入るだぁ！
Entry.EnglishText: That's why I'm going in! You gals come join me too!

Entry.JapaneseText: いくらなんでも、また入るなんて……
Entry.EnglishText: Hey, no matter how you beg us...

Entry.JapaneseText: 放っとこ放っとこ♪
Entry.EnglishText: Oh let him be! Let's go~

Entry.JapaneseText: イデーーー！ オー、イデーーーーー！！！ 思いきし、打ってしまった……
Entry.EnglishText: Owww! O-Owiee! I-I've let my imagination won over...

Entry.JapaneseText: 今は、お湯を抜いて掃除する時間なんです
Entry.EnglishText: Oh. I forgot to notify him that the bath's being cleaned at the moment.

Entry.JapaneseText: 空の湯船に飛び込んだってわけか。そりゃ、痛いわ
Entry.EnglishText: Oh, so he ended up leaping in huh. My condolences bro. That's gotta hurt.
